completed_tasks.name: D-59 tilted galaxy discs in skybox.gdshader (galaxy_disc_coords_tilted + bounded D-54 grain overlay)
completed_tasks.note: The ONE kept improvement from this phase. Verified by user: 'galaxies look right now'.

completed_tasks.name: Revert StarPointRenderer approach to pre-05 baseline (3d35740), stars drawn by skybox again

remaining_tasks.name: Re-plan phase 05 from clean baseline with a ROBUST approach to galaxy-space star findability (do NOT reuse manual-clip-space MultiMesh billboards)
Solve the original problem: in Galaxy space the home galaxy's own stars are sub-pixel meshes and not on the skybox, so they vanish

blockers.description: Original phase goal still unsolved after revert: galaxy-space stars are invisible (sub-pixel meshes + skybox only paints next-tier-OUT bodies). A new, robust rendering approach must be chosen during re-plan.
blockers.workaround: Stars render normally in Star space via skybox + WorldRenderer mesh; the gap is specifically Galaxy/Universe space.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide the re-plan approach for galaxy-space star findability (discuss-phase recommended)
human_actions_pending.context: User wants to restart phase 05 from the beginning; the StarPointRenderer approach was abandoned.

decisions.decision: Abandon the StarPointRenderer MultiMesh PSF approach (all of 05-01)
decisions.rationale: The godot-starlight 'manual clip-space POSITION + far-plane-clip' billboard technique had a long chain of engine-specific failures (script-not-attached/missing UID, _Ready-before-parent NRE, back-face cull, NDC-z clip, ALBEDO flood, screen-filling quad scale, frustum-cull AABB). Each was real but the technique was too fragile to be worth it.

decisions.decision: Keep ONLY the D-59 tilted galaxy discs
decisions.rationale: User confirmed it as the only visible improvement.

decisions.decision: Render stars via the skybox again (restored baseline star loop + push)
decisions.rationale: User directive; robust and already working in Star space.

decisions.decision: Restart phase 05 planning from this baseline
decisions.rationale: Existing 05-01/05-02/05-03 PLAN files describe the abandoned approach and are stale.

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 5 (recommended) or /gsd-plan-phase 5 to re-plan galaxy-space star findability with a robust approach. First read the BLOCKING anti-pattern in .continue-here.md.
context_notes: Phase 05 was executed (3 plans, all parked at human-verify checkpoints). Play-testing exposed that 05-01's StarPointRenderer never rendered reliably. After ~10 incremental fixes, user called it: revert everything except the galaxy tilt. Codebase is now at pre-05 baseline + galaxy tilt (commit c98f56c), build clean, 18/18 TierClassifier tests pass. The galaxy disc tilt shader (galaxy_disc_coords_tilted) and the fixed bounded grain overlay are the only retained changes. Stale PLAN files for 05-01/02/03 remain on disk and should be regenerated on re-plan.
